description: The Israeli mafia refers to organized crime groups operating in Israel or consisting of Israeli members. There are 16 crime families, including Jewish and Arab groups, involved in activities such as gambling, car theft, prostitution, human trafficking, money laundering, murder, extortion, loan sharking, and drug dealing. Major groups include the Abergils, Abutbuls, Alperons, Dumranis, Shirazis, Amir Molnar, and Zeev Rosenstein syndicates. The groups have penetrated the formal economy and local governments, and have been involved in a mob war since the early 2000s.

country_links.evidence_quote: Georgian-Jewish crime families have been able to expand their operations to Western European cities such as Antwerp and Vienna.
country_links.context: Georgian-Jewish crime families have expanded operations to Vienna.

country_links.evidence_quote: Georgian-Jewish crime families have been able to expand their operations to Western European cities such as Antwerp and Vienna.
country_links.context: Georgian-Jewish crime families have expanded operations to Antwerp.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Alperon clan came from Egypt
country_links.context: The Alperon clan came from Egypt, indicating a historical link.

country_links.evidence_quote: Russian and Ukrainian Jewish criminals have also been able to set up networks in the United States, following the large migration of Russian Jews to New York City and Miami, but also in European cities such as Berlin and Antwerp.
country_links.context: Russian and Ukrainian Jewish criminals have set up networks in Berlin.
The Shirazi clan came from Iran, indicating a historical link.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Israeli mafia killed Israeli citizens in broad daylight at a restaurant in a shopping mall in Mexico City on July 24, 2019.
country_links.context: The Israeli mafia killed Israeli citizens in a restaurant in Mexico City.

country_links.evidence_quote: a large number of Israeli organized criminals have fled to Morocco in recent years.
country_links.context: Israeli organized criminals have fled to Morocco, and some crime families originated from Morocco.

country_links.evidence_quote: Israeli crime organizations such as the Abergil crime family and Zeev Rosenstein were heavily involved in ecstasy trafficking in the United States.
country_links.context: Israeli crime organizations such as the Abergil crime family and Zeev Rosenstein were heavily involved in ecstasy trafficking in the United States.
